description_long: This kiosk is a tall, rectangular column structure with four vertical panels, each featuring vibrant, high-resolution printed graphics. The panels display a striking image of a woman's face adorned with autumn leaves, accompanied by bold text reading 'RESORT EXTRUSIONS' in a modern sans-serif font. The kiosk stands on a wooden platform, suggesting it is designed for indoor or event use, and is large enough to be a prominent visual feature in a public space. The structure appears to be made primarily of lightweight metal framing and rigid printed panels, likely acrylic or composite board, with no visible windows or doors. The top of the kiosk is flat and open, with black framing accentuating the edges and corners. The overall design is sleek, contemporary, and visually impactful, intended to attract attention and convey branding in a commercial or exhibition setting.
description: A tall, rectangular kiosk with vivid printed graphics and bold branding, set on a wooden platform with a sleek, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full 'RESORT EXTRUSIONS' text, the woman's face, and the autumn leaf motif, with a person standing beside for scale.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the edge of the kiosk, partial text, and the continuation of the woman's face and leaf graphics.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displays the opposite side of the kiosk, with the text and image wrapping around the structure.
description_view_3: Back view focuses on the woman's face and leaf graphics, with no visible text, emphasizing the visual motif.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign integrated into all vertical panels, featuring 'RESORT EXTRUSIONS' text and a large image of a woman's face with autumn leaves.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with black framing, no overhangs or decorative elements.
